_comment: Canonical CRO mood rotation ('same guy, shifting moods'). One persona (variants/v5-flustered/flavor_persona.txt); the mood modulates intensity via a one-line cue appended to the flavor task plus its sampling. Held hold_hours per phase, seeded deterministically from the capture timestamp. Validated on real Pi frames 2026-07-20; the production CRO (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-20-cro-pi-integration-design.md) bakes these in.

moods.label: composed
moods.cue: Today you feel almost calm about it.

moods.label: flustered
moods.cue: Today you feel flustered and a little out of your depth.

moods.label: rattled
moods.cue: Today the responsibility is really starting to get to you.

moods.label: unraveling
moods.cue: Today you are coming apart a little.
